meta.title: Q-Day Checker | Quantus - Assess Your Quantum Risk
meta.description: Is your digital security ready for Q-Day? Use the Quantus Q-Day Checker to assess your vulnerability to quantum computing threats and learn how to protect your assets.

hero_banner.title: Is your wallet exposed?
hero_banner.sub: Enter any Ethereum address. We will scan its transaction history and balance to calculate your quantum vulnerability. Know your risk before Q-Day arrives.
hero_banner.validation_error: Please enter a valid Ethereum address (0x... 42 characters) or ENS name (example.eth).
hero_banner.fine_print: Reads public blockchain data only. No private keys required.

definition.title: Q-Day is coming.
definition.body_1: Q-Day is the moment quantum computers become powerful enough to break the cryptography securing most of today's digital assets. Once your public key is exposed, a sufficiently powerful quantum computer can derive your private key and drain your wallet without your knowledge.
definition.body_2: The window to act is open. It will not stay that way.

method.title: Two risk factors. One score.
method.intro: The Quantum Risk Checker scans any Ethereum address or ENS name and calculates a Quantum Readiness Score based on two signals:
method.signal_1_body: Every outgoing transaction permanently exposes your public key on-chain. The longer it has been exposed, the higher the risk.
method.signal_2_body: The higher the balance in an exposed wallet, the more attractive the target. High balance combined with an exposed key means maximum risk.

advice.title_line2: Here's what to do about it.
advice.body: If your wallet is exposed, the only real solution is moving your assets to a quantum-secure address. The Quantus wallet is built on a chain where every transaction is signed with post-quantum cryptography, meaning your assets are protected not just today, but when quantum computers arrive.
advice.footer_note: The Quantum Risk Checker is built by Quantus, the quantum-secure L1 blockchain.

errors.empty: Please enter an Ethereum address or ENS name.
errors.invalid: Please enter a valid Ethereum address (0x... 42 characters) or ENS name.
errors.ens_failed: Could not resolve ENS name. Make sure it is correct or use a 0x address.

recommendations.smart_contract: This is a smart contract. Smart contract quantum security analysis coming soon!
recommendations.public_key_exposed: Your public key has been exposed through outgoing transactions, making it vulnerable to quantum attacks. Consider moving the funds to a new address.
recommendations.public_key_safe: Excellent! No outgoing transactions mean your public key remains secure.
recommendations.balance_very_high: Your high balance makes your address more attractive to a quantum attacker. Consider splitting your funds into multiple addresses with smaller balances.
recommendations.balance_high: Your high balance makes your address more attractive to a quantum attacker. Consider splitting your funds into multiple addresses with smaller balances.
recommendations.balance_medium: Your high balance makes your address more attractive to a quantum attacker. Consider splitting your funds into multiple addresses with smaller balances.
recommendations.balance_low: Your high balance makes your address more attractive to a quantum attacker. Consider splitting your funds into multiple addresses with smaller balances.
recommendations.receive_only: Consider using this address only for receiving funds to maintain quantum security.
recommendations.empty_address: Empty address has minimal quantum risk exposure.

meta.title: Quantus - Quantum-Secure Encrypted Money
meta.description: Quantus: Quantum-secure encrypted money. Download our wallet for post-quantum protected assets.

problem.headline: $3 trillion in crypto. Zero quantum defense.

qubits.label: Qubits to Break Bitcoin
qubits.sub: logical qubits required for a cryptographically relevant quantum computer

solution.typewriter_text: Quantus is quantum secure, private, scalable money. It uses NIST-approved post-quantum cryptography, ZK for scaling, and PoW mining. Maximally fair tokenomics modeled after Bitcoin.

newsletter.headline: The window is open.
newsletter.sub: Get quantum security updates, protocol news, and early access straight to your inbox.
newsletter.error_message: Please fill in each field with a valid value.

success.headline: You're in.
success.sub: We'll keep you ahead of the curve.

blog_section.headline: Stay ahead of the quantum shift.

meta.title: Technology | Quantus - Quantum-Secure Encrypted Money
meta.description: Explore the technical foundations of Quantus. Learn about our NIST-standard post-quantum cryptography, recursive ZK-proofs, and scalable Layer 1 architecture.

hero_banner.sub: Scaled with zero-knowledge proofs. Secured by Proof of Work.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.subtitle: No migration. No compromises.
architecture.content: Every existing blockchain was built before quantum computers were a real threat. That means their security is on borrowed time. Quantus is the next generation, with post-quantum cryptography as the foundation. No messy migration required.

signatures.title: Quantum-Secure Signatures
signatures.body: Every transaction on Quantus is signed with ML-DSA-87. The highest security standard being adopted by organizations like Cloudflare and Signal.

network_layer.title: Secured Network Layer
network_layer.body: Most chains only secure transactions. Quantus secures everything - including the communications between nodes. There's no weak point in the stack.

scale.title: Built to Scale
scale.body: Post-quantum signatures are larger than classical ones. We solved that with a zero-knowledge proof system that compresses thousands of transactions into a single verifiable proof - without sacrificing security.

meaning.title: What This Means
meaning.body: Classical blockchains use elliptic curve cryptography. A sufficiently powerful quantum computer can break it - deriving private keys from public ones, forging transactions, stealing funds. ML-DSA, the algorithm Quantus uses, has no known quantum vulnerability. Its security is based on a class of mathematical problems that quantum computers cannot solve efficiently.

urgency.title: Why It Matters Now
urgency.body: Pre-quantum chains face a hard migration. They need to implement new cryptographic standards, get every user to migrate, and decide what to do with unmigrated coins, all while figuring out how to scale PQC. The window to migrate is closing. Quantus doesn't need to migrate. It started there.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.subtitle: Scaling superior money.
scalability.content: Post-quantum cryptography comes with a tradeoff - larger signatures mean fewer transactions per block. Every chain working on quantum security will hit this wall. Quantus already solved it.

stat.label: Throughput Improvement
stat.sub: vs raw post-quantum transactions with ZK proof aggregation

scalability.description: Thousands of transactions. One compact proof. Verified on-chain.

consensus.title: Consensus
consensus.subtitle: Proof-of-Work. Built for ZK.
consensus.body: Quantus uses Proof-of-Work consensus. The same battle-tested model as Bitcoin. One change: the hash function is optimized for zero-knowledge proof systems. That means Quantus's ZK infrastructure is native and efficient rather than bolted on.

cta.title: The full technical picture.
cta.sub: Protocol architecture, cryptographic assumptions, and the complete security model - in the Quantus whitepaper.

meta.title: Wallet | Quantus - Secure Your Assets Against Quantum Threats
meta.description: Download the Quantus wallet for iOS and Android. Experience quantum-secure encrypted money with reversible transactions and private-by-default security.

hero_banner.title: Superior money. In your pocket.
hero_banner.sub: Send, receive, and store quantum-secure sound money. Available on iOS and Android.

advantage.heading: Safe haven security.
advantage.body: Your wallet is only as secure as the blockchain underneath it. Other chains use elliptic curve cryptography, the kind a sufficiently powerful quantum computer can break. Quantus is built differently. Post-quantum cryptography is the foundation of the chain, not a feature added on top. Your wallet inherits that security.

reversible.title: Reversible Transactions
reversible.body: Say goodbye to test transactions. Set a time window on outgoing transfers. Changed your mind? Cancel before the window closes. A safety net that does not compromise finality.

checkphrases.title: Check-Phrases
checkphrases.body: Never fat finger again. Every Quantus address has a human-readable checkphrase. A short sequence of memorable words generated from your address. Verify the phrase before you send. Protect against typos, copy-paste tampering, and address poisoning attacks.

high_security.title: High-Security Accounts
high_security.body: For institutions and advanced users. Create a dead-man switch or assign a guardian to your account who can revert malicious transactions. Guardians can cancel transactions during the reversal period, but not spend on your behalf. Opt-in and composable.

encrypt.title: Private By Default
encrypt.body: Privacy is a right. The same zero-knowledge proof design that scales Quantus to 3,800 TPS also protects your privacy. Your transactions, balance, and history are yours.

issues.heading: Your wallet today. Still safe when quantum arrives.
issues.body: Q-day will not be televised. The Quantus wallet means you do not have to think about it. You are already on the right side of the shift.

cta.title: Own quantum-secure money.
cta.note: Public beta available now on iOS and Android

meta.title: About Us | Quantus - Building a Post-Quantum Financial System
meta.description: Meet the team behind Quantus. We are engineers and researchers dedicated to building permanent economic freedom through quantum-secure infrastructure.

hero.title: Built by people who saw the threat before it was obvious.
hero.sub: Quantus is a team of engineers, researchers, and operators building the infrastructure for a post-quantum financial system.

mission.heading: Permanent Economic Freedom
mission.body1: Every decision we make, from protocol design to user interface, is grounded in deep technical knowledge and a respect for simplicity.
mission.body2: We focus on the fundamentals: mathematically proven security, high performance, and a product experience that feels effortless.
mission.body3: We build with precision. We move fast without cutting corners. And we design for the world that is coming, not the one that has already passed.

meta.title: Quantus - Privacy Policy
meta.description: Read Quantus's Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information across our apps and website.

information_collect.title: Information We Collect
information_collect.from_apps_content: We do not collect personal information through Quantus applications.
information_collect.from_website: From Our Website we automatically collect:
from_you_items: Email address (if you subscribe to our newsletter)
Information you provide when contacting us
technical_items: Application crash reports and error logs

how_we_use.title: How We Use Information
items: Improve our website and applications
Send newsletter updates (with your consent)
Analyze usage to enhance user experience
Monitor for abuse and protect our services
Comply with legal obligations
we_do_not_items: Sell or rent your data to third parties
Store your private keys or transaction data
Use your data for targeted advertising

information_sharing.title: Information Sharing
items: Analytics providers (Google Analytics for website data)
Service providers who help operate our website
Legal authorities when required by law
information_sharing.note: We only share aggregated, anonymized data that cannot identify you.

cookies_tracking.title: Cookies and Tracking
items: Essential website functionality
Analytics to understand site usage
Performance improvements
cookies_tracking.note: You can control cookies through your browser settings, though this may affect website functionality.

data_security.title: Data Security and Retention
data_security.intro: We implement standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption and secure storage. However, no online service is completely secure.

your_rights.title: Your Rights
your_rights.general: You can: Unsubscribe from communications anytime.
your_rights.california: For California residents: You have additional rights under CCPA, including the right to know what personal information we collect and the right to deletion.
your_rights.eu_uk: For EU and UK residents: You have rights under GDPR, including data portability and the right to object to processing.

international_transfers.title: International Transfers
international_transfers.content: Your information may be processed in the United States. We ensure appropriate protections for international data transfers.

childrens_privacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrens_privacy.content: Our services are not intended for anyone under 18. We do not knowingly collect information from minors.

additional_info.title: Additional Information
regulatory_items: Users must comply with local cryptocurrency regulations
Some features may be restricted in certain jurisdictions
We reserve the right to limit access based on legal requirements

contact_info.title: Contact Us

meta.title: Quantus - Terms of Service
meta.description: Read Quantus's Terms of Service for usage rules, responsibilities, and legal disclaimers for our apps and blockchain services.

what_we_provide.title: What We Provide
items: Mobile apps (available on App Store and Google Play)
Desktop applications with integrated mining functionality
Access to our open-source code
Community newsletter and updates
Access to the Quantus blockchain

what_you_cannot_do.title: What You Cannot Do
what_you_cannot_do.intro: You may not use our services to:
items: Engage in illegal activities
Distribute malware or hack systems
Violate export controls or sanctions
Interfere with network operations
Provide false information

mining_participation.title: Mining and Network Participation
items: Mining functionality is for educational and network participation
You must comply with local energy and mining regulations
We make no guarantees about mining profitability or rewards
Network features may change as the protocol evolves

dispute_resolution.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute_resolution.content: Any disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration in Wyoming under American Arbitration Association rules. These terms are governed by Wyoming law. We may terminate access if you violate these terms.

your_responsibilities.title: Your Responsibilities
items: Safeguarding your wallet credentials and seed phrase
Complying with local laws regarding cryptocurrency and mining
Understanding the risks of blockchain technology
Lost private keys cannot be recovered by us

non_custodial.title: Non-Custodial Design
non_custodial.intro: Important: We do not store or access your private keys, seed phrases, or digital assets. You have full control and responsibility for your wallet and assets.
items: We cannot recover lost private keys or seed phrases
We cannot reverse transactions on the blockchain
We cannot freeze or control your assets
You are responsible for securing your wallet credentials
Always back up your seed phrase in a secure location

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers and Limitations
disclaimers.intro: Our services are provided "as-is" without warranties. Cryptocurrency involves substantial risk of loss. To the maximum extent permitted by law:
items: We are not liable for any indirect or consequential damages
Our total liability shall not exceed $1
You agree to indemnify us from claims arising from your use of our services
